FCS1.description: Auto-surveyed fuel collection zone. Estimated radius: 9,624 units. Local nebular density index: 51.7. Source field: 1766454782175. Survey profile: bright ion trails with usable condenser feedstock; field stability uneven but workable; collector saturation estimate 73%. Telemetry confidence: moderate. Short passes should outperform a single static collection burn.
